notes:
Initial release.

- ADB-based proxy injection (LDPlayer/Nox/MEmu/BlueStacks)
- HttpProxyServer per-profile, hot-apply binding
- Auto-enable LDPlayer ADB Debug + auto-reboot running instances
- Leak prevention (DNS/QUIC/ICMP + IPv6) via WinDivert
- Auto-assign proxy round-robin
- Proxy picker dialog with search
- Update checker + installer (.exe)
